final:
module top_module(
    input  USER_SIGNAL_TO_GLOBAL_BUFFER,
    output GLOBAL_BUFFER_OUTPUT

assign GLOBAL_BUFFER_OUTPUT = inverted_output;

    specify

    endspecify

endmodule
